description:
A self-developed Fused deposition modeling slicing software produced by Creality.

Creality Print is a self-developed Fused deposition modeling slicing software produced by Creality. It’s a practical and easy-to-use tool that can help you remote control and monitor your 3D printer and help print directly from your computer.
1. Hot updates are now supported on the Windows version, with no need to re-download or reinstall the full package.

2. The Send page and Device page now support displaying remaining CFS RFID filament (percentage / length). When filament is insufficient, the system can automatically detect and continue printing with filament of the same type and color.

3. The model Cut tool now supports quick right-click assignment to the opposite side.

4. The device list now remembers the user’s preferred Card View or List View layout.

5. Fixed an issue where QR code login was unavailable on some Mac devices.

6. Fixed an issue where purge volume information could not be generated when using PLA as the support interface material for PETG prints.

7. Fixed an issue where slicing progress could take excessively long at 70%–80% for some models.

8. Fixed an issue where the wall order parameter (Inner / Outer / Inner) did not take effect.

9. Fixed an issue where the camera zoom button was missing on some device detail pages in the Mac version.

10. Fixed issues related to camera buttons, translations, and abnormal parameter behavior on certain pages.

##https://wiki.creality.com/en/software/6-0/release-notes-7-1-1
